status_quo: Reported payment volume runs $12M higher than settlement records because 6 transaction metrics fail reconciliation across processing and ledger systems. Treasury plans against inflated figures, and regulatory filings carry numbers that don't tie out.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ reconciles payment volume against settlement records at the transaction level, surfaces the 6 failing metrics, and closes the $12M gap — so treasury forecasts and regulatory filings are built on numbers that survive examination.
headline_finding: Payment volume $12M higher than settlement records — 6 transaction metrics fail reconciliation.
